name: orders
description: Order events emitted by the storefront checkout pipeline.
rationale: Each row is one completed checkout, keyed on order_id. Documenting model-level shape so downstream marts have a stable contract.

columns.name: order_id
columns.description: Surrogate primary key for one completed checkout.
columns.rationale: Required by every downstream join; proposing not_null + unique to lock the contract.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.rationale: FKs that reference dim_customers are checked in every mart; codifying here.
